title: forks & giggles
description: A simple mod that adds forks as weapons
body:
# CONTENT
This mod adds a fun new feature to the game: forks that can be used as weapons. You can craft forks using iron scrap, These scraps are the main ingredient for making your forks.

Right now, the mod is still a work in progress, but here’s what it includes so far:

- ### Forks
- ### A Fork Controller: A special item that sends you fork barrels for crafting your fork
- ### fork barrels: A special block that gives you iron scraps to craft forks.

In the future, more features will be added, like new types of forks, better crafting options, and some fun extras to make the mod even better.

If you enjoy trying out creative new ideas, this mod is a great way to shake up your gameplay. More updates are on the way!

## fork controller
